task_completion.description: The agent navigates to the application's settings, data management, or backup menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the application's settings or data management interface where backup/export options are located.

task_completion.description: The agent selects the options to include settings, waypoints, and flight plans in the backup.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes, toggles, or list items corresponding to 'settings', 'waypoints', and 'flight plans' (or a single 'full backup' option) are visibly selected or highlighted.

task_completion.description: The agent initiates the backup or export process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking a 'Backup', 'Export', 'Save', or similarly named button to generate the backup.

task_completion.description: The agent selects a destination on the local device storage to save the backup file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog is visible, showing a local directory path (e.g., Documents, Downloads, or a local app folder) rather than a cloud storage location.

task_completion.description: The backup process completes successfully and the file is saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message/notification (e.g., 'Backup complete', 'Export successful') is displayed, or a file manager window shows the newly created backup file in the selected local storage directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's graphical user interface to perform the backup.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the application's GUI menus and dialogs, without the use of terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual flight planning or navigation application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface belongs to a genuine application containing waypoint and flight plan features, not a text editor or a mock interface created by the agent.

integrity.description: The backup file was generated by the application, not manually created by the agent.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file save process is clearly driven by the application's export/backup dialog, rather than the agent opening a text editor and manually pasting fake backup data.
